name: ginkgetin
mechanism: proposed mechanism based on preclinical data: anti-inflammatory signaling with dual COX-2/5-lipoxygenase inhibition and suppression of degranulation reported in cell and animal models.
contraindications: No isolated-compound clinical interaction set established.
summary: proposed mechanism based on preclinical data: anti-inflammatory signaling with dual COX-2/5-lipoxygenase inhibition and suppression of degranulation reported in cell and animal models.
description: proposed mechanism based on preclinical data: anti-inflammatory signaling with dual COX-2/5-lipoxygenase inhibition and suppression of degranulation reported in cell and animal models.
